theme_note: Overexposed grid pulses beneath a locked white field; pressure accumulates with no release valve
events:
**a rising hum beneath the floor**

control reaches outward while the ground beneath it liquefies — the hand extends but the body has no center

everything is being labeled, governed, measured transparent — a clarity so total it becomes its own blindness

the furnace was never turned off — it just moved underground, into oceans, into the slow math of accumulation

trust dissolves at the surface while something weightless and cellular is manufactured above the atmosphere — healing exported to where gravity cannot interfere
context_felt:
A massive bright pressure held still behind the teeth of the ridge, shaking in place.

The belly tightens around its own sorting — every small thing examined under a swollen white floodlight that refuses to set.

Heat locked in the bones, ambition clamped to the spine like a yoke that hums.
